title: Check in Control Tower rollout
objective: Create a local commit for adding Control Tower to this repository, staging the appropriate bootstrap/docs/runtime artifacts and stopping before any push.
instructions: Review the current working tree and determine which untracked/modified files belong in the Control Tower rollout commit versus transient in-progress artifacts that should be excluded for diff hygiene.
Stage the appropriate files for the rollout, create a local commit on the current branch, and do not push.
Report the commit hash, commit message, included paths summary, and any excluded transient files or residual risks.
constraints: Do not push, force-push, or rewrite history.
Do not modify product source code except minimal Git-adjacent metadata if required for the commit.
expected_outputs: ResultPacket with commit hash, message, staged scope, and any exclusions or risks.
definition_of_done: A local commit exists for the Control Tower rollout.
Transient artifacts, if excluded, are explicitly listed with rationale.
